title: PulteGroup's Built to Honor® Program Breaks Ground on New Mortgage-Free Home for Injured Veteran and Family in Tennessee
text: MURFREESBORO, Tenn.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Last year U.S. Army Specialist Christopher Lewis was surprised with the life-changing news that he will receive a new mortgage-free home through PulteGroup's Built to Honor® program.
